g.text: bind :: Reader r a ⟶ (a ⟶ Reader r b) ⟶ Reader r b
build a greeting from a config

div.p: A reader computation is a function from a shared read-only environment r to a result a.
bind (>>=) threads the same environment through every step — each step receives the identical r, and the result of each step is passed to the next function. The environment is never modified.

g.title: Run ra with env r to get a. Pass a to f to get Reader r b. Run that with the same env r.
Retrieve the whole environment as the result value.
Project a field out of the environment.
